content: TASK-053 checkpoint done under TASK-010: v0.1.0 release tag and GitHub Release are now live on the sanitized public repo. Release URL: https://github.com/ai-org-labs/archmap/releases/tag/v0.1.0. Public release assets now line up as repo https://github.com/ai-org-labs/archmap, Pages viewer https://ai-org-labs.github.io/archmap/, npm @archmap/core@0.1.0, jsDelivr dist/archmap.js and dist/views3d/three-view.js. The tag was created from /private/tmp/archmap-public-release to avoid publishing private .aof history. Next release follow-up: decide final wording for spec-level zone base view vs product UI zone overlay, add a browser download smoke test when browser automation is available, and keep TASK-011 QIF audit active with full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
